signIn.title: Synamail
signIn.subtitle: Connect Synamail to your Synaplan workspace.
signIn.invalidUrl: That doesn't look like a valid URL. Include https:// — e.g. https://web.synaplan.com
signIn.httpsRequired: Outlook requires an HTTPS address for sign-in. A plain http:// URL (including http://localhost) won't work — run the local HTTPS bridge and use https://localhost:5174 instead.
signIn.localDevHint: Most people can leave this as web.synaplan.com. Change it only to connect to your own self-hosted Synaplan server — the address must start with https://.

chat.emptyHint: Start a conversation — ask a question or paste some text.

read.noEmail: Open an email to use these actions.

meeting.title: Suggested meeting times
meeting.none: No meeting times were proposed in this email.
meeting.unsupported: This Outlook host can't open a new appointment form.
meeting.badDate: Couldn't read that time. Try another slot.

read.askImageHint: {n} image(s) from this email will be sent to Synaplan with your question.

saveDialog.title: Save to knowledge base
saveDialog.savedNoVectorize: Saved as file #{fileId} in {group} (text extracted, but not made AI-searchable — no embedding model is configured).

compose.noCompose: Start a new email or reply to draft with AI.
compose.hint: Describe what you want to say and Synaplan will write the email body.
compose.placeholder: e.g. Invite Alice to lunch next Friday and ask her to confirm.
compose.insertFailed: Couldn't write to the email body. Open a new message or reply and try again.

contactProfile.noContact: Open an email to pick a contact.
contactProfile.noResults: Nothing saved for this contact yet.

profile.title: Rolling profile
profile.empty: No profile yet. Roll the open email in to start one — Synamail builds a growing summary of this contact with every email you add.
profile.noEmailOpen: Open an email from this contact to grow the profile.
profile.unavailable: Contact AI Profiling requires the Synamail plugin on your Synaplan server. Ask your admin to install it (plugins/synamail).

settings.title: Settings
settings.instanceHint: Edit before signing in to use a self-hosted server.
